name: Ensure application assignments are configured through groups
body:
### Security intent

This control validates that **application assignments are configured through groups** across Okta.

### Access condition reviewed

The assessment focuses on application assignments are configured through groups. It reviews the identity, credential, role, or policy state that creates the access condition described by the control.

### Practitioner note

Identity findings deserve careful cleanup rather than blind deletion. Confirm ownership and business need, remove unnecessary standing access, and prefer federation, groups, roles, MFA, and short-lived credentials over direct long-lived grants.
description: Application assignments are configured through groups
remediationDescription:
Go to the **Groups** page, under the Directory section, in the Okta Admin Dashboard, select or create the group, and on the **Applications** tab, press **Assign applications**.
Now, you can remove the individual user assignment. We recommend following the assignment conversion process described in the [Okta documentation](https://help.okta.com/en/prod/Content/Topics/Provisioning/lcm/lcm-convert-user-group.htm).
